headline: ASML Expands Globally, Joins Tata for India Semiconductor Hub
summary: ASML teams up with Tata Electronics to help ramp a $11B Dholera 300mm fab, boosting its India footprint and future DUV-to-EUV sales.

raw.headline: ASML Expands Globally, Joins Tata for India Semiconductor Hub
raw.summary: ASML teams up with Tata Electronics to help ramp a $11B Dholera 300mm fab, boosting its India footprint and future DUV-to-EUV sales.

headline: Stocks Pressured by a Rebound in Crude Prices and Bond Yields
summary: The S&P 500 Index ($SPX ) (SPY ) today is down -0.20%, the Dow Jones Industrial Average ($DOWI ) (DIA ) is down -0.04%, and the Nasdaq 100 Index ($IUXX ) (QQQ ) is down -0.57%. June E-mini S&P futures (ESM26 ) are down -0.28%, and June E-mini Nasdaq futures...

headline: Dan Loeb Dumps Microsoft, Slashes Nvidia And Rail Stocks In Sweeping Q1 Portfolio Overhaul
summary: Daniel Loeb's Third Point added Meta, Alphabet, Broadcom, and semiconductor names while sharply cutting Nvidia and Microsoft positions in Q1.
